favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I hope no one gets fooled by this hotel again. In the photos, there is a swimming pool, but it turns out to be a scam because the pool has no water, and the information was that the pool has never been usable from the start due to leaks. 

What’s worse is that the room and toilet are incredibly dirty, the door cannot be locked, the closet is dusty, the room smells musty, the sheets are dirty, the gypsum ceiling has mold on it, and there is even a packet of drink inside the glass. 

So strange. Do they change guests without cleaning? It was a total nightmare for us at this hotel. 

Basically, don’t even try this hotel if you don’t want to regret it. 

Just remembering it feels like I'm going to faint. 

It’s really bad.
comments.originalComment:
semoga ga ada lg yg tertipu dengan hotel ini, di foto ada kolam renang tp ternyata zonk krn kolam renang ga ada airnya, dan infonya mmg dari awal ga pernah bisa digunakan kolam renangnya krn bocor.
parahnya lagi kamar dan toilet  joroknya luar biasa, pintu ga bisa di kunci, lemari berdebu, ruangan bau apek, sepre kotor, plavonnya gypsum udah jamuran kayak mold gitu, 
bahkan masi ada bungkusan minuman sachet didlm gelas,  
aneh banget. 
apa gonta ganti tamu tanpa di bersihkan? pokoknya mimpi buruk bin serem kami ke hotel ini, 

intinya jgn coba2 lah ke hotel ini klo ga mau nyesal

ingatnya aja serasa mau pingsan

parah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room had no key, the bathroom was dirty, parking was also insufficient. The building was not well-maintained. Although the view was beautiful.
comments.originalComment:
Kamar tidak ada kunci., kamar mandi jorok, parkir juga tidak memadai.
Bangunan tidak terawat. Padahal pemandangan indah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.originalComment: Cocok untuk healing atau bulan madu

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The whole stay was just unfortunate
comments.reviewTitle: As brief as it could be..... not recommended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Not recommended for the hotel, the night atmosphere feels like a haunted place, dark, the environment is not kept clean, and the place itself.
comments.originalComment: Tidak recomendasi hotelnya, suasana malam kayak tempat hantu, gelap, lingkungan tdk dijaga kebersihan dan tempatnya.
